steps.title: Identify what to evaluate
steps.content: We need to find the monthly fee for storing 50 crates, which means evaluating $f(50)$ using the given function $f(x) = 45x + 600$.

steps.title: Substitute x = 50 and calculate
steps.content:
Replace $x$ with 50 in the function:

$$f(50) = 45(50) + 600$$

Multiply first: $45 \times 50 = 2250$

Then add the constant term:

$$f(50) = 2250 + 600 = 2850$$

The answer is 2850.
